en.name: Level 38 — Fold Point
en.shortDescription: A convergence point where Levels 0–37 physically overlap, fusing the architecture and hazards of every earlier level.
en.atmosphere: A chaotic, disorienting amalgam of clashing level designs, badly distorted and dark, in constant structural flux.
en.tips: Photos barely work here. Head toward stabilizing geometry to exit. Don't no-clip outward or you risk the Blue Channel.
